business_ideas.idea: Toucan: Chrome extension that contextually teaches languages by translating words on web pages.
Chrome extensions solving friction problems in existing user behaviors.
Grammarly: real-time grammar correction Chrome extension generating $100M+ annually.
Honey: coupon/deals finder Chrome extension sold to PayPal for $4 billion.
Dashworks: Chrome extension that creates branded company homepage with internal search, profiles, announcements.
Luster: product recommendation engine via Chrome extension comparing reviews across sources.

predictions.text: Chrome extensions will outperform mobile apps due to lower churn and 3B+ potential users vs app store constraints.
